title: ACEF Data Provenance Payload
description: Payload schema for data_provenance records. Captures dataset lineage, acquisition records, and chain of custody per EU AI Act Art. 10, GPAI Annex XI, US Copyright Office guidance, and UK requirements.

source_description.description: Human-readable description of the data source.

legal_basis.description: Legal basis for the data acquisition (e.g., 'license', 'fair_use', 'public_domain', 'consent', 'legitimate_interest').

chain_of_custody.description: Chain of custody documenting how the data moved from source to final use.

actor.description: Person or organization responsible at this step.

opt_out_compliance.description: Evidence of compliance with opt-out mechanisms (robots.txt, TDMRep, HTTP headers).

verification_date.description: Date the opt-out compliance was verified.

exclusions_applied.description: Number of sources excluded due to opt-out signals.

processing_steps.description: Data processing steps applied after acquisition.

data_subjects_consent.description: How consent was obtained from data subjects, if applicable.

geographic_origin.description: Geographic regions where the data originated.

content_categories.description: Categories of content in the dataset (e.g., 'web', 'books', 'licensed_news', 'synthetic').

acquisition_channels.description: Channels through which data was acquired (e.g., 'public_web_crawl', 'licensed_feeds', 'user_generated').

retention_period.description: How long the source data is retained.

deletion_policy.description: Policy for deleting or purging source data.
